name: Anemoi
primary_sources: Tower of the Winds in Athens

visual_attributes.morphology: personified as winged men or gusts of wind

domain_specific_visual.CARDINAL_DIRECTION: each Anemoi is associated with a specific cardinal direction
domain_specific_visual.SEASONAL_ASSOCIATION: each Anemoi is linked to specific weather conditions and seasons

domain_specific_functional.WEATHER_CONTROL: each Anemoi brings specific weather conditions
domain_specific_functional.SEASONAL_INFLUENCE: each Anemoi is associated with a particular season

relationships.description: Eos is the mother of the Anemoi
Astraeus is the father of the Anemoi
The Anemoi are subject to Aeolus, the keeper of the winds

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: symbolize the natural forces of wind and weather
primary_sources: Tower of the Winds in Athens

contrastive_constraints: NOT purely human figures without wings
